content.problemStatement:
NNN line segments (numbered 111 through NNN) are placed on the 2D2D2D-plane. For each valid iii, the iii-th segment starts at Ai‚Éó=(xi,yi)\vec{A_i} = (x_i, y_i)Ai‚Äč‚Äč=(xi‚Äč,yi‚Äč) and ends at Bi‚Éó=(Xi,Yi)\vec{B_i} = (X_i, Y_i)Bi‚Äč‚Äč=(Xi‚Äč,Yi‚Äč). Line segments can move with a velocity of  magnitude 1 unit/sec along the direction of vector (Ai‚Éó‚ąíBi‚Éó)(\vec{A_i} - \vec{B_i})(Ai‚Äč‚Äč‚ąíBi‚Äč‚Äč) or  (Bi‚Éó‚ąíAi‚Éó)(\vec{B_i} - \vec{A_i})(Bi‚Äč‚Äč‚ąíAi‚Äč‚Äč).

At the time t=0t = 0t=0, all segments start moving for each valid iii. You need to assign a direction to the movement of each segment (not necessarily the same for all segments), such that there is no time from t=0t = 0t=0 to t=1010000t = 10^{10000}t=1010000 (both inclusive) when any two segments touch or intersect each other.

Decide if it is possible to assign directions to the segments in such a way that the above condition is satisfied.

###Input:


The first line of input contains a single integer TTT, the number of testcases.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
NNN lines follow,. For each iii (1‚Č§i‚Č§N1 \le i \le N1‚Č§i‚Č§N), the iii-th of these lines contains four space-separated integers xix_ixi‚Äč, yiy_iyi‚Äč, XiX_iXi‚Äč, YiY_iYi‚Äč.
###Output:
For each test case, print a single line containing the string `"YES"` if it is possible to assign the directions in a valid way or `"NO"` if it is impossible.

###Constraints


1‚Č§T‚Č§10001 \leq T \leq 10001‚Č§T‚Č§1000
1‚Č§N‚Č§20001 \leq N \leq 20001‚Č§N‚Č§2000
Sum of NNN over all testcases ‚Č§2000\leq 2000‚Č§2000
Absolute value of coordinates of all points ‚Č§106\leq 10^6‚Č§106
All input points in a single testcase are distinct
